title: [v4.4-rhel] Revert "Use modern tomllib/tomli modules for reading TOML files"
body:
This reverts commit c5a356fb4ea8a6fb66a6d20bdc2c9cffe615028b.

Signed-off-by: Urvashi Mohnani <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@rhatdan @lsm5 PTAL
Will cut a v4.4.1 after this
@umohnani8 do we need a -rhel branch given that we're reverting to toml on the main branch itself?

> @umohnani8 do we need a -rhel branch given that we're reverting to toml on the main branch itself.

If the branch was created for other reasons, then don't mind me :D

The branch is created to track any backports that may need to go into 4.4 so we can cut new 4.4.x from there. So even though we are fixing this in main too, I would like to have a commit to the rhel-4.4 branch so we can cut a 4.4.1 from there instead of main to keep things aligned.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *lsm5*, *umohnani8* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman-py). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/blob/v4.4-rhel/OWNERS)~~ [lsm5,umohnani8] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
for whatever reason, mergebot didn't merge even an hour after PR was good to go.
